app.title: ActivityWatch
nav.noActivityHint: Make sure you have both an AFK and window watcher running
home.title: Hello early user
home.intro: It's still early days for ActivityWatch{android}. We've come a long way but we need users (like you!) to provide feedback and help us turn ActivityWatch into a successful project. Early users like you mean a lot to us, and we hope you'll reach out to us with any ideas you have for improvements!
home.devInvite: If you are a developer, we hope you can contribute by writing a watcher, visualization, or something else, and share it with us on the forum!
home.surveyPrompt: If you have a minute to spare, please take the time to fill out our {survey} or {vote}.
home.voteFeatures: vote on features on the forum
home.spreadDesc: Nothing is as motivating as getting ActivityWatch into the hands of users. By sharing it you get us to make ActivityWatch even better!
home.alternativeTo: Give us a like and a review on {link}
home.twitterFb: Follow us and spread the word on {twitter} and {facebook}
home.supportDesc: Do you like ActivityWatch? Has it helped you? Help us help you by donating! You can donate to us via:
home.donateMore: For more info, please visit the {link}.
home.whatsNew: Want to know what we're working on?
home.changeLanding: You can change which page opens when you open ActivityWatch (instead of this page) in the {link}.
home.androidNote: Note: ActivityWatch on Android is in a very early stage of development. There will be bugs, but we hope you bear with us as we refine things and get it on par with the desktop version of ActivityWatch (which you should try!).
timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.noEvents: No events match selected criteria. Timeline is not updated.
timeline.scrollHint: Scroll to zoom, swipe/horizontal-scroll to pan, arrow keys to navigate
settings.title: Settings
settings.startOfDayDesc: The time at which days "start", since humans don't always go to bed before midnight. Set to 04:00 by default.
settings.startOfWeekDesc: The weekday which starts a new week.
settings.durationDefaultDesc: The default duration used for 'show last' in the timeline view.
settings.landingPageDesc: The page to open when opening ActivityWatch, or clicking the logo in the top menu.
settings.themeDesc: Change color theme of the application (you need to change categories colors manually to be suitable with dark mode).
settings.languageDesc: Change the display language of the application.
settings.newReleaseDesc: We will send you a notification if there is a new release available for download, this check will happen at most once per day.
settings.colorFallbackDesc: Uses the old coloring style for some visualizations when uncategorized or no category color.
settings.activePatternDesc: Apps or titles matching this regular expression will never be counted as AFK. Can be used to count time as active, despite no input (like meetings, or games with controllers). An empty string disables it.
settings.categorizationDesc: Rules for categorizing events. An event can only have one category. If several categories match, the deepest one will be chosen.
settings.categorizationBuilder: You can use the {link} to quickly create categories from uncategorized activity.
settings.categorizationForum: You can also find and share categorization rule presets on {link}.
settings.categorizationDocs: For help on how to write categorization rules, see {link}.
settings.categorySetCount: {count} sets available — switch sets to use different rule profiles.
settings.developerNote: Note: These settings are meant for developers who (hopefully) know what they are doing, and as such, may break things unexpectedly.
settings.forceDevmodeDesc: Devmode enables some features that are still work-in-progress.
settings.showYearlyDesc: Querying an entire year is a very heavy operation, and is likely to lead to timeouts. However, the query might be fast enough if you're running aw-server-rust.
settings.useMultideviceDesc: Multidevice query is where events are collected from several hosts in the Activity view. It is an early experiment, that currently does not support browser buckets (or the audible-as-active feature).
settings.requestTimeoutDesc: The maximum amount of time a server request can take before timing out. Setting this to a high value can be useful for large queries. Note that you need to reload the web UI for it to apply.
categoryBuilder.title: Categorization helper
categoryBuilder.desc1: This tool will help you create categories from your uncategorized time.
categoryBuilder.desc2: It works by fetching all uncategorized time for a recent timeperiod, and then finds the most common words (by time, not count) each of which may then either be ignored (if too broad/irrelevant), or used to create a new (sub)category, or to append the word to a pre-existing category rule. Words with less than 60s of time will not be shown.
categoryBuilder.desc3: When you're done, you can inspect the categories in the {link} page.
categoryBuilder.noWords: No words with significant duration. You're good to go!
unsavedConfirm: Your categories have unsaved changes, are you sure you want to leave?
unsavedSwitchConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Switch sets anyway? (Changes will be discarded)
deleteSetConfirm: Delete category set "{id}"? This cannot be undone.
newSetPrompt: Name for the new category set:
buckets.title: Buckets
buckets.moreWatchers: Are you looking to collect more data? Check out {link} for more watchers.
buckets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete bucket "{id}"?
buckets.deleteHostConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} buckets for host "{hostname}"?
buckets.deleteWarning: This is permanent and cannot be undone!
buckets.importPlaceholder: Choose or drop a file here...
buckets.importDesc: A valid file to import is a JSON file from either an export of a single bucket or an export from multiple buckets. If there are buckets with the same name the import will fail.
search.title: Search
search.earlyDev: This feature is still in early development.
search.notFound: Didn't find what you were looking for?
search.addWeek: Add a week to the search:
stopwatch.title: Stopwatch
stopwatch.earlyExp: This is an early experiment. Data entered here is not shown in the Activity view, yet.
notFound.title: Woops, this page was not found!
notFound.message: Try navigating back where you came from.
report.title: Report
report.desc: Generate a report of time spent on a certain category of device activity.
report.earlyDev: This feature is still in early development.
graph.title: Graph
graph.desc: Displays a graph of categories and their transitions.
graph.earlyDev: This feature is still in early development.
alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.earlyDev: This feature is still in early development.
queryExplorer.title: Query Explorer
queryExplorer.desc: See {link} for help on how to write queries.
workReport.title: Work Time Report
